chart.series: [ { name: 'Measurement', data: [ { x: 'Group A', y: gaussianViolin(50, 8, 400) }, { x: 'Group B', y: gaussianViolin(62, 5, 600) }, { x: 'Group C', y: gaussianViolin(45, 12, 250) }, { x: 'Group D', y: gaussianViolin(55, 6, 500) }, { x: 'Group E', y: gaussianViolin(48, 10, 350) }, { x: 'Group F', y: gaussianViolin(58, 7, 450) }, { x: 'Group G', y: gaussianViolin(52, 9, 300) }, ], }, ]
